In the Arrow-Debreu benchmark, where there is no economic power and political power is seemingly irrelevant, there is no need for trade agreements – free trade is the optimal policy for each country. But under even minimal deviations from that benchmark, trade agreements matter. We focus on environments in which there are market failures, technology is endogenous, and there is political power. Power dynamics play, for instance, a critical role in the design, implementation, and enforcement of agreements, with the latter being a critical difference between international agreements and domestic contracts and a key determinant of the feasibility and consequences of agreements. With endogenous technology, trade rules proscribing industrial policies may lead to lower growth and greater cross-country inequalities. Finally, we develop a framework which may be useful in the design and implementation of trade rules.
32533.zh_abstract: 本文分析了国际贸易规则设计的框架，假设存在某种法治是可能的。在阿罗-德布鲁基准模型中，不存在经济权力，政治权力似乎无关紧要，因此不需要贸易协定——自由贸易对每个国家都是最优政策。但即使在该基准模型的最小偏离下，贸易协定也变得重要。我们聚焦于存在市场失灵、技术内生化以及存在政治权力的环境。例如，权力动态在协定的设计、实施和执行中起着关键作用，后者是国际协定与国内合同之间的关键区别，也是协定可行性和后果的关键决定因素。在技术内生化的情况下，禁止产业政策的贸易规则可能导致增长放缓和国家间不平等加剧。最后，我们开发了一个可能有助于设计和实施贸易规则的框架。
32533.meta: Programs：IO, ITI, POL；JEL：B17, F13, F15, F50, O24, Q56

32587.title: Judging the Judges: Indexing of Complex Information Reduces Injustice
32587.zh_title: 评判法官：复杂信息的索引化减少不公正
32587.authors: Andrew Caplin, Andrei Gomberg, Joyce Sadka
32587.abstract: We demonstrate that cognitive constraints produce injustice in its most paradigmatic form: incorrect verdicts in judicial trials. Responding to a request for help, we conducted a field study in Mexican labor courts in which time pressure on the judges leads to their making mistakes, many of which are appealed. All we did was to index pages to random case files to help judges quickly find relevant information. We made no other changes whatsoever. Our treatment greatly reduced successful appeals, fully 50% in complex cases, and resulted in judicial opinions that were shorter and more on point. These findings have already informed recent reforms in Mexico's labor court procedures and have broader applicability.
32587.zh_abstract: 我们证明认知约束会导致其最典型形式的不公正：司法审判中的错误判决。应请求提供帮助，我们在墨西哥劳动法院进行了一项实地研究，其中法官面临的时间压力导致他们犯错，其中许多错误被上诉。我们所做的只是将随机案卷的页面编入索引，以帮助法官快速找到相关信息。我们没有进行任何其他更改。我们的处理大大减少了成功上诉，在复杂案件中减少了整整50%，并使得司法意见更简短、更切题。这些发现已为墨西哥劳动法院程序近期的改革提供了信息，并具有更广泛的适用性。

32586.title: Market Design in Regulated Health Insurance Markets: Risk Adjustment vs. Subsidies
32586.zh_title: 监管健康保险市场中的市场设计：风险调整与补贴
32586.authors: Liran Einav, Amy Finkelstein, Pietro Tebaldi
32586.abstract: Health insurance is increasingly provided through managed competition, in which subsidies for consumers and risk adjustment for insurers are key market design instruments. We illustrate theoretically that, in markets with adverse selection, subsidies provide greater flexibility in tailoring premiums to heterogeneous buyers, and produce equilibria with lower markups and greater enrollment. We assess these effects quantitatively using estimates from the California ACA marketplace.
32586.zh_abstract: 健康保险越来越多地通过管理竞争来提供，其中对消费者的补贴和对保险公司的风险调整是关键的市场设计工具。我们从理论上说明，在存在逆向选择的市场中，补贴在针对异质性买家定制保费方面提供了更大的灵活性，并产生具有更低加成率和更高参保率的均衡。我们利用加州ACA市场的估计来定量评估这些效应。
32586.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：G22, G28, H51, I13

32585.title: Book-Value Wealth Taxation, Capital Income Taxation, and Innovation
32585.zh_title: 账面财富税、资本所得税与创新
32585.authors: Fatih Guvenen, Gueorgui Kambourov, Burhan Kuruscu, Sergio Ocampo-Diaz
32585.abstract: When is a wealth tax preferable to a capital income tax? When is the opposite true? More generally, can capital taxation be structured to improve productivity, incentivize innovation, and ultimately increase welfare? We study these questions theoretically in an infinite-horizon model with entrepreneurs and workers, in which entrepreneurial firms differ in their productivity and are subject to collateral constraints. The stationary equilibrium features heterogeneous returns and misallocation of capital. We show that increasing the wealth tax increases aggregate productivity. The gains result from the “use-it-or-lose-it” effect of wealth taxes when returns are heterogeneous, which causes a reallocation of capital from entrepreneurs with low productivity to those with high productivity. Furthermore, if the capital income tax is adjusted to balance the government's budget, aggregate capital, output, and wages also increase. We then study the welfare maximizing combination of wealth and capital income taxes and show that the optimal mix shifts towards a higher wealth tax and a lower capital income tax as the capital intensity of production increases. For a range of plausible parameter values, the optimal wealth tax is positive, whereas the capital income tax can be positive or negative (a subsidy). We then endogenize the entrepreneurial productivity distribution by introducing either ex ante innovation or entrepreneurial effort in production and show that this strengthens our results: by allowing entrepreneurs to keep more of the upside relative to a capital income tax, a wealth tax incentivizes more innovation and entrepreneurial effort, leading to larger increases in productivity, output, and welfare.
32585.zh_abstract: 何时财富税优于资本所得税？何时相反？更一般地说，资本税能否被设计成提高生产率、激励创新并最终增加福利？我们在一个包含企业家和工人的无限期界模型中从理论上研究这些问题，其中企业家企业具有不同的生产率并面临抵押约束。稳态均衡具有异质性回报和资本错配的特征。我们表明，提高财富税会提高总体生产率。收益源于当回报异质时财富税的“要么使用，要么失去”效应，这导致资本从低生产率企业家重新配置到高生产率企业家。此外，如果调整资本所得税以平衡政府预算，总资本、产出和工资也会增加。然后，我们研究财富税和资本所得税的福利最大化组合，并表明随着生产资本密集度的提高，最优组合会转向更高的财富税和更低的资本所得税。在一系列合理的参数值下，最优财富税为正，而资本所得税可以为正或负（补贴）。然后，我们通过引入事前创新或生产中的企业家努力来内生化企业家生产率分布，并表明这强化了我们的结果：通过允许企业家相对于资本所得税保留更多上行收益，财富税激励了更多创新和企业家努力，导致生产率、产出和福利的更大增长。
32585.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, LS, ME, PE, PR；JEL：E21, E25, E60, H21, H24, J31

32584.title: Extraordinary Labor Market Developments and the 2022-23 Disinflation
32584.zh_title: 非凡的劳动力市场发展与2022-23年的去通胀
32584.abstract: Two extraordinary U.S. labor market developments facilitated the sharp disinflation in 2022-23 without raising the unemployment rate. First, pandemic-driven infection worries and social distancing intentions caused a sizable drag on labor force participation that began to reverse in the first quarter of 2022, and perhaps earlier. As the reversal unfolded, it raised labor supply and reduced wage growth. Second, the pandemic-instigated shift to work from home (WFH) raised the amenity value of employment in many jobs and for many workers. This development lowered wage-growth pressures along the transition path to a new equilibrium with pay packages that recognized higher remote work levels and their benefits to workers. Surveys of business executives imply that the shift to WFH lowered average wage growth by two percentage points from spring 2021 to spring 2023. A direct inspection finds that average real wage growth from 2021 Q1 to 2024 Q1 in the U.S. economy was at least 3.5 to 4.4 ppts below the path suggested by pre-pandemic experience. This large shortfall in real wage growth aligns well with the interpretation of the 2022-23 disinflation offered here.
32584.zh_abstract: 美国劳动力市场的两项非凡发展促进了2022-23年期间在不提高失业率的情况下实现急剧去通胀。首先，疫情引发的感染担忧和社交距离意愿对劳动力参与率造成了显著拖累，这种拖累从2022年第一季度（或许更早）开始逆转。随着逆转的展开，劳动力供给增加，工资增长放缓。其次，疫情引发的居家办公转变提高了许多工作岗位和许多工人的就业舒适度价值。这一发展在向新均衡的过渡路径上降低了工资增长压力，新均衡的薪酬方案承认了更高的远程工作水平及其对工人的益处。对商业高管的调查表明，从2021年春季到2023年春季，向居家办公的转变使平均工资增长率降低了两个百分点。直接检查发现，从2021年第一季度到2024年第一季度，美国经济中的平均实际工资增长至少比疫情前经验所暗示的路径低3.5至4.4个百分点。实际工资增长的这一巨大缺口与本文对2022-23年去通胀的解释高度吻合。

32583.title: Does the EITC Reduce Caregiving for Parents?
32583.zh_title: 劳动所得税抵免是否会减少对父母的照料？
32583.authors: Katherine Michelmore, Anna Wiersma Strauss, Emily E. Wiemers
32583.abstract: Families provide substantial care to older adults with functional limitations. Policies that incentivize work have the potential to reduce this valuable care. This study uses the Health and Retirement Study (HRS) and a simulated instrument approach to examine the consequences of increases in the generosity of the Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC), a work-contingent cash benefit, for the care that parents receive from their EITC-eligible daughters. We find that increases in EITC generosity reduce the care that parents receive from their EITC-eligible daughters, especially older parents and those with functional limitations. To assess the full effect of this reduction in caregiving, we examine whether financial transfers increase as a substitute for reduced care, whether other adult children fill the care gap left by EITC-eligible daughters, and whether paid caregiving increases in response to declines in family care. We find no evidence of increased financial transfers and care gaps remain for older parents that are not filled by other children or paid care providers. We conclude that an unintended consequence of the EITC is that the older parents of EITC recipients receive less care from their children overall in response to increased EITC benefit generosity.
32583.zh_abstract: 家庭为有功能限制的老年人提供了大量照料。激励工作的政策有可能减少这种宝贵的照料。本研究使用健康与退休研究数据和模拟工具方法，考察劳动所得税抵免（一种与工作挂钩的现金福利）慷慨程度的提高，对符合EITC条件的女儿所获得的父母照料的影响。我们发现，EITC慷慨程度的提高减少了父母从符合EITC条件的女儿那里获得的照料，尤其是对年长父母和有功能限制的父母而言。为了评估这种照料减少的全面影响，我们考察了财务转移是否作为减少照料的替代而增加，其他成年子女是否填补了符合EITC条件的女儿留下的照料缺口，以及付费照料是否因家庭照料的减少而增加。我们没有发现财务转移增加的证据，并且年长父母的照料缺口仍然存在，未被其他子女或付费照料提供者填补。我们得出结论，EITC的一个意外后果是，随着EITC福利慷慨程度的提高，EITC领取者的年长父母总体上从子女那里获得的照料减少了。

32582.title: Rent Guarantee Insurance
32582.abstract: A rent guarantee insurance (RGI) policy makes a limited number of rent payments to the landlord on behalf of an insured tenant unable to pay rent due to a negative income or health expenditure shock. We introduce RGI in a rich quantitative equilibrium model of housing insecurity and show it increases welfare by improving risk sharing across idiosyncratic and aggregate states of the world, reducing the need for a large security deposits, and reducing homelessness which imposes large costs on society. While unrestricted access is not financially viable with either private or public insurance providers due to moral hazard and adverse selection, restricting access can restore viability. Private insurers must target better off renters to break even, while public insurers focus on households most at-risk of homelessness.
32582.zh_abstract: 租金担保保险单代表无法支付租金的受保租户（因负面收入或健康支出冲击）向房东支付有限次数的租金。我们在一个丰富的住房不安全定量均衡模型中引入RGI，并表明它通过改善跨特定和总体状态的世界的风险分担、减少对大量保证金的需求以及减少给社会带来巨大成本的无家可归现象，从而提高了福利。虽然由于道德风险和逆向选择，无论是私人还是公共保险提供者，无限制的准入在财务上均不可行，但限制准入可以恢复可行性。私人保险公司必须瞄准较富裕的租户才能实现盈亏平衡，而公共保险公司则专注于最有可能无家可归的家庭。
32582.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, PE；JEL：E20, E62, G11, G18, G22, G5, R21, R38

32581.title: Automating Short-Term Payroll Savings: Evidence from Four Large U.K. Experiments
32581.zh_title: 自动化短期工资储蓄：来自英国四项大型实验的证据
32581.authors: Sarah Holmes Berk, James J. Choi, Jay Garg, John Beshears, David Laibson
32581.abstract: Automatic enrollment is often used to increase retirement savings. What are the effects of using it (or, alternatively, requiring an active enrollment choice) to increase short-term savings? We evaluate two experiments in the U.K. at employers that enable workers to set up payroll contributions to fund short-term savings accounts. In the first experiment (N = 7,404), employees at two firms were randomly assigned opt-in, opt-out, or active choice enrollment into the short-term savings program. Nine months later, participation was 48 percentage points higher under automatic enrollment than opt-in enrollment, and average balances were £114 higher. In the second experiment (N = 3,605), after years of offering opt-in payroll contributions to fund a short-term savings account, the employer changed to opt-out enrollment for new hires only. In tenure month 18, participation in the short-term savings program was 48 percentage points higher under automatic enrollment, and average balances were £193 higher.
32581.zh_abstract: 自动注册常被用于增加退休储蓄。使用它（或者，替代地，要求主动注册选择）来增加短期储蓄的效果如何？我们评估了英国雇主的两项实验，这些实验使工人能够设立工资缴款来资助短期储蓄账户。在第一项实验（N = 7,404）中，两家公司的员工被随机分配到短期储蓄计划的默认加入、默认退出或主动选择注册。九个月后，自动注册下的参与率比默认加入注册高出48个百分点，平均余额高出114英镑。在第二项实验（N = 3,605）中，在提供多年默认加入工资缴款以资助短期储蓄账户后，雇主改为仅对新员工实行默认退出注册。在任职第18个月时，自动注册下短期储蓄计划的参与率高出48个百分点，平均余额高出193英镑。

32580.title: The Impact of Price Transparency in Outpatient Provider Markets
32580.zh_title: 门诊服务市场价格透明化的影响
32580.authors: Kayleigh Barnes, Sherry A. Glied, Benjamin R. Handel, Grace Kim
32580.abstract: Medical provider price transparency is often touted as a way to lower health care spending. But the impact of price transparency is theoretically ambiguous: it could lower health care spending via increased consumer price shopping or improved insurer bargaining but could also raise health care prices via improved provider bargaining or provider collusion. We conduct a randomized-controlled trial to examine the impact of a state-wide medical charge transparency tool in outpatient provider markets in New York State. In the experiment, individual providers’ billed charges (list prices) were released randomly at the level of the procedure and three-digit zipcode. We use a comprehensive commercial claims database to assess the impact of this intervention and find that it leads to a small increase in overall billed charges (+0.75%). This effect is concentrated among low-priced providers in markets with low out-of-network spending, suggesting that the transparency tool improves provider pricing information. We find no evidence of quantity effects. Results do not vary consistently across specialty groups, market concentration, frequency of service use, or frequency of website use. These results are consistent with price transparency having a minimal effect on consumer shopping while slightly improving provider information about competitors’ charges.
32580.zh_abstract: 医疗服务价格透明化常被宣传为降低医疗保健支出的方式。但价格透明化的影响在理论上是不确定的：它可能通过增加消费者价格比较或改善保险公司议价来降低医疗保健支出，但也可能通过改善医疗服务提供者议价或提供者合谋来提高医疗价格。我们进行了一项随机对照试验，以考察纽约州门诊服务市场中全州医疗收费透明工具的影响。在实验中，个体提供者的收费价格（标价）在程序和三位邮政编码层面被随机公布。我们使用一个全面的商业索赔数据库来评估这一干预的影响，发现它导致总体收费价格小幅上涨（+0.75%）。这一效应集中在低价格提供者和网络外支出较低的市场，表明透明工具改善了提供者的定价信息。我们没有发现数量效应的证据。结果在不同专业组、市场集中度、服务使用频率或网站使用频率之间并不一致。这些结果与价格透明化对消费者购物影响极小，同时略微改善提供者关于竞争对手收费价格信息的观点一致。

32579.title: Property Insurance and Disaster Risk: New Evidence from Mortgage Escrow Data
32579.zh_title: 财产保险与灾害风险：来自抵押贷款托管账户数据的新证据
32579.abstract: We develop a new dataset to study homeowners insurance using over 74 million premiums from 2014–2024 inferred from mortgage escrow payments. We document rapidly rising premiums and a doubling of the pass-through from disaster risk into premiums. Using variation in correlated wildfire and hurricane exposure, we show that the increase in the risk-to-premium gradient was accelerated by a repricing of catastrophic risk in global capital markets. Premium increases are capitalized into home values, reducing home price growth by over $\$40,000$ in the most exposed zipcodes. The premium and home price effects are larger in areas facing rising climate risk.
32579.zh_abstract: 我们利用从2014年至2024年从抵押贷款托管账户支付中推断出的超过7400万笔保费，开发了一个新的数据集来研究房主保险。我们记录了保费的快速上涨以及灾害风险向保费传导率的翻倍。利用相关野火和飓风暴露的差异，我们表明风险-保费梯度的增加因全球资本市场对巨灾风险的重新定价而加速。保费上涨被资本化到房屋价值中，使风险最高的邮政编码区的房价增长减少了超过40,000美元。保费和房价效应在面临日益增长的气候风险的地区更大。
32579.meta: Programs：EEE, PE；JEL：G21, G22, G52, Q54, R31

32578.title: Fertility Beliefs and Outcomes: The Role of Relationship Status and Attractiveness
32578.zh_title: 生育信念与结果：关系状态和吸引力的作用
32578.authors: Yifan Gong, Tyler Skura, Ralph Stinebrickner, Todd R. Stinebrickner
32578.abstract: Unique data from the Berea Panel Study provides new evidence about fertility outcomes before age 30 and beliefs about these outcomes elicited soon after college graduation. Comparing outcomes and beliefs yields a measure of belief accuracy. Individuals who are unmarried and not in relationships at age 24 are extremely optimistic about the probability of having children, while married individuals have very accurate beliefs. Novel attractiveness measures are central for understanding fertility beliefs and outcomes for females but not for males. Marriage is a mechanism that is relevant for understanding differences in beliefs, outcomes, and misperceptions across relationship and attractiveness groups.
32578.zh_abstract: 来自伯里亚小组研究的独特数据提供了关于30岁前生育结果以及大学毕业后不久对这些结果的信念的新证据。比较结果和信念得出了信念准确性的衡量标准。24岁时未婚且未处于恋爱关系中的个体对生育子女的概率极为乐观，而已婚个体的信念非常准确。新颖的吸引力衡量标准对于理解女性的生育信念和结果至关重要，但对男性则不然。婚姻是一个机制，对于理解不同关系和吸引力群体在信念、结果和误解方面的差异具有相关性。

32577.title: The Chronic Disease Index: Analyzing Health Inequalities Over the Lifecycle
32577.zh_title: 慢性病指数：分析生命周期中的健康不平等
32577.authors: Kaveh Danesh, Jonathan T. Kolstad, William D. Parker, Johannes Spinnewijn
32577.abstract: The rich live longer than the poor, but relatively little is known about the evolution of health inequality across the lifecycle. Using rich administrative data from the Netherlands, we develop an index of chronic disease burden based on the projected contribution to old-age mortality. Chronic conditions account for one-third of the mortality gap in old age. Using our index we demonstrate that health inequality arises much earlier in life; by age 35, the bottom half of the income distribution has the same disease burden as those age 50 in the top half. Approximately 60% of the divergence across income groups is due to low-income individuals developing chronic illness at a faster rate, rather than chronically ill individuals sorting into lower-income groups. Using linked health survey data, we then examine the contributions of various mediators to the incidence of chronic diseases over the life cycle. Socioeconomic and geographic factors explain most of the variation, while individual health behaviors play a moderate role. Our findings align with calls to target health policies toward early-life social determinants of health.
32577.zh_abstract: 富人比穷人活得更长，但关于健康不平等在整个生命周期中的演变知之甚少。利用来自荷兰的丰富行政数据，我们基于对老年死亡率的预测贡献，开发了一个慢性病负担指数。慢性病解释了老年死亡率差距的三分之一。利用我们的指数，我们证明健康不平等在生命早期就已出现；到35岁时，收入分布下半部分人群的疾病负担与收入上半部分50岁人群相同。大约60%的收入群体间差异是由于低收入个体以更快的速度患上慢性病，而不是慢性病患者流入低收入群体。利用关联的健康调查数据，我们随后考察了各种中介因素对生命周期中慢性病发病率的贡献。社会经济和地理因素解释了大部分变异，而个人健康行为则起到中等作用。我们的发现与将健康政策瞄准生命早期健康社会决定因素的呼吁相一致。
32577.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, PE；JEL：I1, I12, I14

32576.title: Traumatic Financial Experiences and Persistent Changes in Financial Behavior: Evidence from the Freedman's Savings Bank
32576.zh_title: 创伤性金融经历与金融行为的持久变化：来自自由民储蓄银行的证据
32576.authors: Vellore Arthi, Gary Richardson, Mark Van Orden
32576.abstract: The failure of the Freedman's Savings Bank (FSB), one of the only Black-serving banks in the early post-bellum South, was an economic catastrophe and one of the great episodes of racial exploitation in post-Emancipation history. It was also most Black Americans' first experience of banking. Can events like these permanently alter financial preferences and behavior? To test this, we examine the impact of FSB collapse on life insurance-holding, an accessible alternative savings vehicle over the late 19th and early 20th centuries. We document a sharp and persistent increase in insurance demand in affected counties following the shock, driven disproportionately by Black customers. We also use FSB migrant flows to disentangle place-based and cohort-based effects, thus identifying psychological and cultural scarring as a distinct mechanism underlying the shift in financial behavior induced by the bank's collapse. Horizontal and intergenerational transmission of preferences help explain the shock’s persistent effects on financial behavior.
32576.zh_abstract: 自由民储蓄银行（FSB）是战后初期南部少数几家服务于黑人的银行之一，其倒闭是一场经济灾难，也是解放后历史上种族剥削的重大事件之一。对大多数美国黑人而言，这也是他们首次接触银行业。此类事件是否会永久性地改变金融偏好和行为？为检验这一假设，我们考察了FSB倒闭对19世纪末20世纪初一种可获得的替代储蓄工具——人寿保险持有——的影响。我们记录了受冲击县保险需求的急剧且持久的增长，这种增长主要由黑人客户驱动。我们还利用FSB移民流来分离基于地点和基于队列的影响，从而将心理和文化创伤识别为银行倒闭所引发的金融行为转变背后的独特机制。偏好的横向和代际传递有助于解释该冲击对金融行为的持久影响。
32576.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, IFM；JEL：D63, G21, G22, G51, G52, I30, N21, N22, N31, N32

32575.title: Historical Differences in Female-Owned Manufacturing Establishments: The United States, 1850-1880
32575.zh_title: 女性所有制制造业企业的历史差异：美国，1850-1880年
32575.authors: Ruveyda Gozen, Richard Hornbeck, Anders Humlum, Martin Rotemberg
32575.abstract: We characterize female-owned manufacturing establishments using newly digitized manuscripts from the US Census of Manufactures (1850, 1860, 1870, 1880). Female-owned establishments were smaller than male-owned establishments and had lower capital-to-output ratios, which could reflect more-constrained financial access and other distortions. Female-owned establishments employed more women and paid women higher wages, creating a potential cycle between increased female business ownership and increased female labor market participation. Female-owned establishments concentrated in sub-industries like women's clothing and millinery, which is associated with some but not all of these differences. We also show how female owners differed from other women in the Population Census.
32575.zh_abstract: 我们利用新数字化的美国制造业普查手稿（1850年、1860年、1870年、1880年）来刻画女性所有制制造业企业的特征。女性所有制企业规模小于男性所有制企业，且资本产出比更低，这可能反映了更受限制的融资渠道和其他扭曲因素。女性所有制企业雇佣更多女性，并向女性支付更高工资，从而在女性企业所有权增加与女性劳动力市场参与增加之间形成了一个潜在循环。女性所有制企业集中于女装和女帽等子行业，这与部分（但非全部）上述差异相关。我们还展示了女性所有者与人口普查中其他女性之间的差异。
32575.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, DEV, EFG, IO, LS, PR；JEL：M1

32574.title: Political Connections, Allocation of Stimulus Spending, and the Jobs Multiplier
32574.zh_title: 政治关联、刺激支出分配与就业乘数
32574.authors: Joonkyu Choi, Veronika Penciakova, Felipe Saffie
32574.abstract: We study the role of firms’ political influence on the effectiveness of government spending using ARRA as a laboratory. Through an IV approach, we show that a 10 percentage points increase in the share of politically connected spending lowers the job creation effect of stimulus by 33 percent at the state level. We exploit ex-post close state-level elections to establish that firms that contributed to winning candidates create fewer jobs after winning grants. Using a quantitative general equilibrium model, we show that politically connected spending also lowers the aggregate jobs multiplier, and that the dampening effect is rationalized by connected firms charging higher markups.
32574.zh_abstract: 我们以《美国复苏与再投资法案》（ARRA）为实验室，研究企业政治影响力对政府支出有效性的作用。通过工具变量方法，我们表明，在州层面，政治关联支出份额每增加10个百分点，刺激计划的就业创造效应就会降低33%。我们利用事后激烈的州级选举来证明，向获胜候选人捐款的企业在获得拨款后创造的就业岗位更少。通过一个定量一般均衡模型，我们表明政治关联支出也会降低总体就业乘数，并且这种抑制效应可以通过关联企业收取更高的加成率来合理化。

32573.title: Printing Away the Mortgages: Fiscal Inflation and the Post-Covid Boom
32573.zh_title: 印钞还贷：财政通胀与后疫情繁荣
32573.authors: William F. Diamond, Tim Landvoigt, Germán Sánchez Sánchez
32573.abstract: We analyze the impact of fiscal and monetary stimulus in an economy with mortgage debt, where inflation redistributes from savers to borrowers. We show theoretically that fiscal transfers without future tax increases cause a surge in inflation, increasing consumption demand and house prices. The power of fiscal stimulus grows when borrowers are more indebted. We then show quantitatively that transfers followed by easy monetary policy cause a surge in inflation which helps explain features of the post-Covid boom, including a boom in output and house prices. This boom comes with a longer-term contraction, since redistribution reduces borrower labor supply.
32573.zh_abstract: 我们分析了在存在抵押贷款债务的经济体中，财政和货币刺激的影响，其中通胀将财富从储蓄者重新分配给借款人。我们从理论上证明，没有未来增税的财政转移会导致通胀飙升，增加消费需求和房价。当借款人负债更高时，财政刺激的效力会增强。然后，我们定量表明，转移支付之后伴随宽松货币政策会导致通胀飙升，这有助于解释后疫情繁荣的特征，包括产出和房价的繁荣。这种繁荣伴随着长期收缩，因为再分配减少了借款人的劳动力供给。

32572.title: U.S. Liquid Government Liabilities and Emerging Market Capital Flows
32572.zh_title: 美国流动性政府负债与新兴市场资本流动
32572.abstract: Empirical work finds that flows of investments from the U.S. and other high income countries to emerging markets increase during times of quantitative easing (QE) by the U.S. Federal Reserve, and the reverse movement occurs under quantitative tightening. We offer new evidence to confirm these findings, and then propose a theory based on the liquidity of U.S. government liabilities held by the public. We hypothesize that QE, by increasing liquidity, offers greater flexibility for investors that might be concerned their funds will be tied up when shocks to income or investment opportunities arise. With the assurance that some of their portfolio can be readily sold in liquid markets, rich country investors are more willing to increase investments in illiquid loans to emerging markets. The effect of increasing the liquidity of U.S. government liabilities on investments in EMs may even be stronger during times of greater uncertainty. We find evidence to support our interpretation: QE lowers covered interest parity deviations for the dollar, as our model predicts.
32572.zh_abstract: 实证研究发现，在美国联邦储备系统实施量化宽松（QE）期间，从美国和其他高收入国家流向新兴市场的投资增加，而在量化紧缩期间则出现反向流动。我们提供了新的证据来证实这些发现，然后基于公众持有的美国政府负债的流动性提出一个理论。我们假设，量化宽松通过增加流动性，为那些担心在收入或投资机会受到冲击时资金被套牢的投资者提供了更大的灵活性。由于确信其部分投资组合可以在流动性市场上随时出售，富裕国家的投资者更愿意增加对新兴市场非流动性贷款的投资。在不确定性更高的时期，增加美国政府负债流动性对新兴市场投资的影响甚至可能更强。我们发现了支持我们解释的证据：正如我们的模型所预测的，量化宽松降低了美元的抛补利率平价偏差。

32571.title: Effects of the Expansion of the Earned Income Tax Credit for Childless Young Adults on Material Wellbeing
32571.zh_title: 针对无子女年轻劳动者的劳动所得税抵免扩大对物质福祉的影响
32571.authors: Jiwan Lee, Katherine Michelmore, Natasha Pilkauskas, Christopher Wimer
32571.abstract: In 2021, the U.S. Congress temporarily expanded the Earned Income Tax Credit for workers without a qualifying child (childless EITC), to help counteract the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on lower-wage working adults. This expansion roughly tripled the maximum benefits for qualifying filers and lowered the minimum age to claim the credit from 25 to 19, providing new benefits to low-income young adults. Using data from the Census Bureau’s Household Pulse Survey and a difference-in-differences design, this study is among the first to examine the impact of the expanded childless EITC on young adults’ material hardship (food, housing, and expenses). We find that the temporary expansion led to a significant decrease in housing hardship among low-income, childless, young adults, and suggestive evidence that it also reduced food insufficiency and difficulty with expenses. Overall our findings show that the temporary expansion of the childless EITC helped reduce material hardship among young adults.
32571.zh_abstract: 2021年，美国国会暂时扩大了针对无合格子女劳动者（无子女EITC）的劳动所得税抵免，以帮助抵消COVID-19大流行对低工资成年劳动者的影响。此次扩大使合格申报者的最高福利大约增加了两倍，并将申领该抵免的最低年龄从25岁降至19岁，为低收入年轻人提供了新的福利。利用人口普查局家庭脉搏调查的数据和双重差分设计，本研究率先考察了扩大后的无子女EITC对年轻人物质困难（食物、住房和开支）的影响。我们发现，这一临时扩大显著降低了低收入、无子女年轻人的住房困难，并有提示性证据表明它也减少了食物不足和开支困难。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，无子女EITC的临时扩大有助于减少年轻人的物质困难。

32570.title: Preschool Lottery Admissions and Its Effects on Long-Run Earnings and Outcomes
32570.zh_title: 学前教育抽签录取及其对长期收入和结果的影响
32570.abstract: We use an admissions lottery to estimate the effect of a non-means tested preschool program on students’ long-run earnings, employment, family income, household formation, and geographic mobility. We observe long-run outcomes by linking both admitted and non-admitted individuals to confidential administrative data including tax records. Funding for this preschool program comes from an Indigenous organization, which grants Indigenous students admissions preference and free tuition. We find treated children have between 5 to 6 percent higher earnings as young adults. The results are quite large for young women, especially those from the lower half of the initial parental household income distribution. There is also some evidence that children, regardless of gender, from households with below median parental incomes realize the largest average increases in earnings in adulthood. Finally, we find that increased earnings start at ages 21 and older for the treated students. Likely mechanisms include high-quality teachers and curriculum.
32570.zh_abstract: 我们利用入学抽签来估计一个非经济状况调查型学前教育项目对学生长期收入、就业、家庭收入、家庭组建和地理流动性的影响。我们通过将被录取和未被录取的个人与包括税务记录在内的机密行政数据相链接，来观察长期结果。该学前教育项目的资金来自一个原住民组织，该组织给予原住民学生录取优先权和免费学费。我们发现，接受过该项目的儿童在成年后的收入高出5%至6%。对于年轻女性，尤其是那些来自初始父母家庭收入分布下半部分的女性，结果相当显著。还有一些证据表明，无论性别如何，来自父母收入低于中位数家庭的儿童在成年后收入的平均增幅最大。最后，我们发现，被录取学生的收入增长始于21岁及以后。可能的机制包括高质量的教师和课程。
32570.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS；JEL：I20, I21, I24, I26, J31

32569.title: In their Shoes: Empathy through Information
32569.zh_title: 设身处地：信息引发的共情
32569.authors: Marianne Andries, Leonardo Bursztyn, Thomas Chaney, Milena Djourelova, Alex Imas
32569.abstract: We explore the mechanics of empathy. We show that information about an outgroup can potentially activate and magnify empathy when presented in conjunction with an experience simulating their struggles. This response increases the willingness to help the struggling group, but it is only activated when the information comes before the experience and not after. We provide evidence for this effect in an immersive virtual reality experiment where participants (“witnesses”) simulate the struggle of unauthorized migrants (“protagonists”). These results are then replicated in a series of controlled lab experiments. We show that this effect operates through an increase in interpersonal similarity, or relatability. If information shifts perceptions of relatability, which changes people’s experience when witnessing the protagonist’s struggles, then it magnifies their empathetic response and drives them to engage in more prosocial behavior. Together, our evidence suggests that the ability to put oneself in the shoes of another person or group can be enhanced by activating empathy through simple information provision.
32569.zh_abstract: 我们探索共情的机制。我们表明，关于外群体的信息，当与模拟其困境的经历相结合呈现时，有可能激活并放大共情。这种反应会增加帮助困境群体的意愿，但只有当信息出现在经历之前而非之后时才会被激活。我们在一个沉浸式虚拟现实实验中为这种效应提供了证据，参与者（“见证者”）模拟了未经授权的移民（“主角”）的困境。这些结果随后在一系列受控的实验室实验中得到了复制。我们表明，这种效应是通过增加人际相似性或可关联性来发挥作用的。如果信息改变了对可关联性的感知，从而改变了人们在目睹主角困境时的体验，那么它就会放大他们的共情反应，并驱使他们从事更多的亲社会行为。总之，我们的证据表明，通过简单的信息提供来激活共情，可以增强设身处地为他人或群体着想的能力。

32568.title: Creative Destruction, Stock Return Volatility, and the Number of Listed Firms
32568.zh_title: 创造性破坏、股票收益波动率与上市公司数量
32568.authors: Söhnke M. Bartram, Gregory W. Brown, René M. Stulz
32568.abstract: Average idiosyncratic volatility and firm idiosyncratic volatility increase with the number of listed firms. Average industry idiosyncratic volatility increases with the number of listed firms in the industry. We ex-plain the relation between idiosyncratic volatility and the number of listed firms through Schumpeterian creative destruction. We show that Schumpeterian creative destruction increases as the number of listed firms increases. However, there is no consistent evidence of an incremental effect of the number of non-listed firms on idiosyncratic volatility either in the aggregate or at the industry level, suggesting that listed firms play a unique role in the dynamism of the economy.
32568.zh_abstract: 平均特质波动率和公司特质波动率随上市公司数量的增加而上升。行业平均特质波动率随该行业上市公司数量的增加而上升。我们通过熊彼特式创造性破坏来解释特质波动率与上市公司数量之间的关系。我们表明，随着上市公司数量的增加，熊彼特式创造性破坏也会加剧。然而，无论是在总体层面还是在行业层面，都没有一致的证据表明非上市公司数量对特质波动率存在增量效应，这表明上市公司在经济活力中扮演着独特角色。

32567.title: Sufficient Statistics for Measuring Forward-Looking Welfare
32567.zh_title: 衡量前瞻性福利的充分统计量
32567.authors: Lautaro Adamovsky, David Baqaee, Ariel Burstein, Yasutaka Koike-Mori
32567.abstract: We propose a sufficient-statistics method to measure a money-metric index of dynamic welfare. The method relies on two assumptions: (i) individuals’ preferences are separable between present and future consumption, and (ii) a subset of households bear no undiversifiable idiosyncratic risk. For this group, we infer the value of the future relative to the present from consumption-saving behavior. We then pin down the welfare of all other households by matching their budget shares. Our method accommodates incomplete markets, life-cycle motives, non-rational expectations, and non-exponential discounting—without specifying functional forms. Implementation needs only time series of prices, repeated cross-sectional income-balance-sheet- spending data, and an estimate of the intertemporal-substitution elasticity. In simulations, our method tracks true welfare better than net-present-value calculations, especially under credit constraints. Applied to the PSID, our measure differs sharply from a static index. Our estimates can be used to study the welfare effect of shocks without enumerating every margin and forecasting every horizon through which those shocks operate.
32567.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种充分统计量方法，用于衡量动态福利的货币化指数。该方法依赖于两个假设：（i）个体的偏好可在当前消费与未来消费之间分离；（ii）一部分家庭不承担不可分散的特质性风险。对于这一群体，我们通过消费-储蓄行为推断未来相对于当前的价值。然后，通过匹配其他所有家庭的预算份额来确定其福利水平。我们的方法能够适应不完全市场、生命周期动机、非理性预期以及非指数贴现，而无需指定函数形式。实施该方法仅需要时间序列价格数据、重复截面收入-资产负债表-支出数据，以及跨期替代弹性的估计值。在模拟中，我们的方法比净现值计算更能准确追踪真实福利，尤其是在存在信贷约束的情况下。应用于PSID数据时，我们的衡量指标与静态指数存在显著差异。我们的估计可用于研究冲击的福利效应，而无需逐一列举这些冲击所影响的每个边际和预测每个时间跨度。
32567.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI；JEL：C14, D0, D10, D11, E0, E01, E20, I3, J6

32566.title: International Policy Coordination in a Multisectoral Model of Trade and Health Policy
32566.zh_title: 多部门贸易与健康政策模型中的国际政策协调
32566.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Zhengyang Jiang, Robert J. Richmond, Ernst-Ludwig Von Thadden
32566.abstract: We analyze international trade and health policy coordination during a pandemic by developing a two-economy, two-sector trade model integrated into a micro-founded SIR model of infection dynamics. Disease transmission intensity can differ by goods (manufactured versus services and domestic versus foreign). Governments can adopt containment policies to suppress infection spread domestically, and levy import tariffs to prevent infection from abroad. The globally coordinated policy dynamically adjusts both policy instruments heterogeneously across sectors. The more-infected country aggressively contains the pandemic, raising tariffs and tilting the terms of trade in its favor, while the less-infected country lowers tariffs to share its economic pain. In contrast, in the Nash equilibrium of uncoordinated policies the more infected country does not internalize the global spread of the pandemic, lowering tariffs and its terms of trade, especially in the contact-intensive services sector, while the less infected country counters the spread by raising tariffs. Coordination therefore matters: the health-cum-trade war leads to less consumption and production, as well as smaller health gains due to inadequate global diversification of infection curves.
32566.zh_abstract: 我们通过构建一个融入微观基础SIR感染动态模型的两经济体、两部门贸易模型，分析了疫情期间国际贸易与健康政策的协调问题。疾病传播强度可能因商品类型（制造业与服务品、国内与国外）而异。政府可以采取遏制政策以抑制国内感染传播，并征收进口关税以防止境外感染。全球协调政策会动态地、跨部门异质地调整这两种政策工具。感染更严重的国家会积极遏制疫情，提高关税并改善其贸易条件，而感染较轻的国家则会降低关税以分担经济痛苦。相比之下，在非协调政策的纳什均衡中，感染更严重的国家不会将疫情的全球传播内部化，从而降低关税及其贸易条件，尤其是在接触密集型服务部门，而感染较轻的国家则通过提高关税来应对传播。因此，协调至关重要：健康与贸易战会导致消费和生产减少，并且由于感染曲线缺乏全球多样化，健康收益也较小。

32565.title: Dynamic Models, New Gains from Trade?
32565.zh_title: 动态模型：贸易的新收益？
32565.authors: Christoph Boehm, Andrei A. Levchenko, Nitya Pandalai-Nayar, Hiroshi Toma
32565.abstract: Yes. We state closed-form expressions for steady state gains from trade that apply in a class of dynamic trade models that includes dynamic versions of the Krugman (1980), Melitz (2003), and customer capital (e.g., Arkolakis, 2010) models. As in Arkolakis, Costinot, and Rodríguez-Clare (2012), the gains are a function of the domestic trade share and the long-run elasticity of trade with respect to iceberg trade costs. This elasticity, however, cannot be recovered from the long-run tariff elasticity alone, because the dynamic trade adjustment mechanism present in this class of models increases the difference between the iceberg and the tariff elasticity in the long run. Our main substantive finding is that the dynamic gains from trade are unambiguously greater than those implied by static models, conditional on the same long-run tariff elasticity. We propose an approach to implement the formula by combining tariff elasticity estimates at multiple horizons and demonstrate that the difference relative to static models can be substantial. Accounting for the transition path has a modest impact on the magnitude of the gains from trade, relative to simply comparing steady states using the formula.
32565.zh_abstract: 是的。我们给出了适用于一类动态贸易模型的稳态贸易收益的闭式表达式，这类模型包括Krugman（1980）、Melitz（2003）和客户资本（例如Arkolakis，2010）模型的动态版本。与Arkolakis、Costinot和Rodríguez-Clare（2012）一样，这些收益是国内贸易份额和贸易对冰山贸易成本的长期弹性的函数。然而，这个弹性无法仅从长期关税弹性中恢复，因为这类模型中存在的动态贸易调整机制增加了长期中冰山弹性与关税弹性之间的差异。我们的主要实质性发现是，在相同的长期关税弹性条件下，动态贸易收益明确大于静态模型所隐含的收益。我们提出了一种方法，通过结合多个时间跨度的关税弹性估计来实施该公式，并证明与静态模型的差异可能相当显著。与仅使用公式比较稳态相比，考虑转型路径对贸易收益规模的影响较小。

32564.title: Turbocharging Profits? Contract Gaming and Revenue Allocation in Healthcare
32564.zh_title: 利润增压？医疗保健中的合同漏洞利用与收入分配
32564.authors: Atul Gupta, Ambar La Forgia, Adam Sacarny
32564.abstract: Firms often exploit loopholes in government contracts to boost revenues. The welfare consequences of this behavior depend on how firms use the marginal windfall dollar, yet little evidence exists to guide policymakers. This paper studies how hospitals allocated over $\$3$ billion obtained from gaming a Medicare payment loophole. The average gaming hospital increased both Medicare and total revenue by around 10%, implying large spillovers on other payers. Consistent with theories of organizational behavior, nonprofit hospitals deployed most of the windfall toward operating costs, while for-profits deducted the entire amount off their balance sheet, distributing a substantial portion to executives and shareholders. Accordingly, we detect modest reductions in mortality rates at nonprofits but no changes at for-profits. Our results imply that the consequences of such engineered windfalls vary substantially by hospital ownership.
32564.zh_abstract: 企业经常利用政府合同中的漏洞来增加收入。这种行为对福利的影响取决于企业如何使用边际意外收入，但指导政策制定者的证据却很少。本文研究了医院如何分配通过利用Medicare支付漏洞获得的超过30亿美元。平均而言，利用漏洞的医院将其Medicare收入和总收入均提高了约10%，这意味着对其他支付方产生了巨大的溢出效应。与组织行为理论一致，非营利医院将大部分意外收入用于运营成本，而营利性医院则将全部金额从其资产负债表中扣除，并将相当一部分分配给高管和股东。相应地，我们检测到非营利医院的死亡率略有下降，但营利医院没有变化。我们的结果表明，这种人为设计的意外收入的后果因医院所有权而异。

32563.title: Fighting Abuse with Prescription Tracking: Mandatory Drug Monitoring and Intimate Partner Violence
32563.zh_title: 通过处方追踪打击滥用：强制性药物监测与亲密伴侣暴力
32563.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Bilge Erten, David W. Hummel, Pinar Keskin, Shuo Zhang
32563.abstract: The opioid crisis generates broader societal harms beyond direct health and economic effects, impacting non-users through adverse spillovers on children, families, and communities. We study the spillover effects of a supply-side policy aimed at reducing the over-prescribing of opioids on women’s wellbeing by examining its effects on intimate partner violence (IPV). Using administrative data on incidents reported to law enforcement, in conjunction with quasi-experimental variation in the adoption of stringent mandatory access prescription drug monitoring programs, we find that these policies have generated a downstream benefit for women by significantly reducing their overall exposure to IPV and IPV-involved injuries by 9 to 10 percent. Strongest effects are experienced by groups with higher rates of opioid consumption at baseline, including non-Hispanic Whites. However, we also find a significant uptick in heroin-involved IPV incidents, suggesting substitution into illicit drug consumption. Our results highlight the need to identify high-risk groups prone to switching to illicit opioids and to address this risk through evidence-based policies. Accounting for effects on IPV adds to the estimated societal burden of the opioid epidemic.
32563.zh_abstract: 阿片类药物危机除了直接的健康和经济影响外，还通过不利的溢出效应对儿童、家庭和社区产生更广泛的社会危害。我们通过研究旨在减少阿片类药物过度处方的供给侧政策对亲密伴侣暴力的影响，来考察其对女性福祉的溢出效应。利用向执法部门报告的事件行政数据，并结合各州采用严格的强制性访问处方药监测计划的准实验性变化，我们发现这些政策为女性带来了下游收益，显著降低了她们遭受亲密伴侣暴力的总体风险以及涉及伤害的亲密伴侣暴力事件，降幅为9%至10%。在基线阿片类药物消费率较高的群体中，包括非西班牙裔白人，效果最为显著。然而，我们也发现涉及海洛因的亲密伴侣暴力事件显著增加，这表明存在向非法药物消费的替代。我们的结果强调了识别倾向于转向非法阿片类药物的高风险群体，并通过循证政策应对这一风险的必要性。将亲密伴侣暴力的影响纳入考量，增加了对阿片类药物流行社会负担的估计。
32563.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, PE；JEL：H0, I12, I18, J12, J16, K0

32562.title: Statistical Discrimination and the Distribution of Wages
32562.authors: Prashant Bharadwaj, Rahul Deb, Ludovic Renou
32562.abstract: We characterize the conditions under which the wage distributions for two groups are consistent with a general model of statistical discrimination. We adapt this theoretical characterization to develop a novel empirical test, the rejection of which we interpret as evidence of taste-based discrimination. In doing so, we provide a theoretical foundation via which the wage structure effect in the decomposition of wage distributions can be interpreted as evidence of taste-based discrimination. We provide a proof of concept application using Census and NLSY-79 data, which suggests taste-based discrimination at work against Black male workers in several broad occupation categories.
32562.zh_abstract: 我们刻画了两个群体的工资分布与一个一般统计歧视模型相一致的条件。我们调整这一理论刻画，开发了一种新颖的实证检验，我们将对该检验的拒绝解释为基于偏好的歧视的证据。在此过程中，我们提供了一个理论基础，通过该基础，工资分布分解中的工资结构效应可以被解释为基于偏好的歧视的证据。我们利用人口普查和NLSY-79数据提供了一个概念验证应用，该应用表明在几个广泛的职业类别中，针对黑人男性工人的基于偏好的歧视在起作用。

32561.title: Dynamic Targeting: Experimental Evidence from Energy Rebate Programs
32561.zh_title: 动态定向：来自能源回扣项目的实验证据
32561.authors: Takanori Ida, Takunori Ishihara, Koichiro Ito, Daido Kido, Toru Kitagawa, Shosei Sakaguchi, Shusaku Sasaki
32561.abstract: Economic policies often involve dynamic interventions, in which individuals receive repeated treatments over multiple periods. However, existing economic studies typically focus on static targeting, potentially overlooking valuable information generated by dynamic interventions. We develop a framework for designing optimal dynamic targeting policies that maximize social welfare. We show that dynamic targeting can outperform static targeting through several key mechanisms—learning, habit formation, and adaptive targeting effects—and develop a method to empirically identify these effects. Using a sequential randomized controlled trial (RCT) of a residential energy rebate program, we find that dynamic targeting nearly doubles the social welfare gains relative to static targeting and produces more than five times larger welfare gains than non-targeting policies. We also investigate how households’ anticipatory responses to adaptive assignment rules affect the welfare gains from dynamic targeting.
32561.zh_abstract: 经济政策通常涉及动态干预，即个体在多个时期内接受重复处理。然而，现有的经济研究通常侧重于静态定向，可能忽视了动态干预产生的有价值信息。我们开发了一个设计最优动态定向政策的框架，以最大化社会福利。我们表明，动态定向可以通过几个关键机制——学习效应、习惯形成效应和适应性定向效应——优于静态定向，并开发了一种实证识别这些效应的方法。利用一个住宅能源回扣项目的序贯随机对照试验，我们发现动态定向产生的社会福利收益几乎是静态定向的两倍，并且比非定向政策产生的福利收益高出五倍以上。我们还研究了家庭对适应性分配规则的预期反应如何影响动态定向的福利收益。
32561.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, LS, PE；JEL：C1, C50, C9, C93, Q4, Q40, Q41, Q48, Q50, Q58

32560.title: Financial Incentives for Adoption and Kin Guardianship Improve Achievement for Foster Children
32560.zh_title: 收养和亲属监护的经济激励改善寄养儿童学业成就
32560.authors: David Simon, Aaron Sojourner, Jon Pedersen, Heidi Ombisa Skallet
32560.abstract: This paper reports new evidence that giving financial rewards for adopting a child from foster care or becoming a kin guardian improves the later school performance of these children. It uses linked administrative data to examine a policy change in Minnesota. This change increased the payments to adoptive parents and kin guardians for children ages 6 and older, making them equal to what foster care payments were, but didn't raise payments as much for younger children. Difference-in-differences analysis shows that this policy of equalizing payments increased the average academic achievement of foster children by 31 percent of a standard deviation three years after their cases began. Additionally, the policy raised the total value of payments to these children by about $\$2,000$ during this period. It also led to a 29 percent increase in the monthly chance of moving from foster care to adoption or kin guardianship, improved school stability, and reduced school suspensions. This research contributes to the limited evidence on how financial incentives can encourage adoptions and is one of the first to provide evidence of its positive effects on outcomes beyond the child welfare system.
32560.zh_abstract: 本文提供了新证据，表明对从寄养机构收养儿童或成为亲属监护人给予经济奖励，能够改善这些儿童日后的学业表现。研究利用关联行政数据，考察了明尼苏达州的一项政策变化。该政策提高了对6岁及以上儿童收养父母和亲属监护人的支付金额，使其与寄养支付水平持平，但对更年幼儿童的支付提高幅度较小。双重差分分析显示，这项支付均等化政策在案件启动三年后，使寄养儿童的平均学业成就提高了31%的标准差。此外，该政策在此期间使这些儿童获得的支付总额增加了约2000美元。它还导致每月从寄养转向收养或亲属监护的概率提高了29%，改善了学校稳定性，并减少了停学处分。本研究为经济激励如何促进收养的有限证据做出了贡献，并且是首批提供证据表明其对儿童福利系统以外结果具有积极影响的研究之一。

32559.title: Custom Proxy Voting Advice
32559.authors: Edwin Hu, Nadya Malenko, Jonathon Zytnick
32559.abstract: This paper studies institutional investors’ decision-making using novel data from a major proxy advisor. We highlight the significant role of customized proxy advice in shaping shareholders’ voting decisions. About 80% of funds receive customized advice, and custom recommendations differ substantially from benchmark recommendations. We show that customization plays two key roles. First, it helps shareholders express their ideologies through the vote. Second, it facilitates shareholders’ decision-making process by reducing the need to pay attention to every proposal individually and enabling focus on the more important proposals. Customization thus influences both the aggregation of preferences and the aggregation of information in voting outcomes. Our findings offer a new perspective on the role of proxy advisors and suggest a shift away from solely focusing on benchmark recommendations.
32559.zh_abstract: 本文利用一家主要代理顾问机构的新数据，研究机构投资者的决策过程。我们强调了定制化代理建议在塑造股东投票决策中的重要作用。约80%的基金接受定制化建议，且定制建议与基准建议存在显著差异。我们表明，定制化发挥两个关键作用。首先，它帮助股东通过投票表达其意识形态。其次，它通过减少对每项提案逐一关注的需求，并使股东能够聚焦于更重要的提案，从而便利了股东的决策过程。因此，定制化既影响了投票结果中偏好的聚合，也影响了信息的聚合。我们的发现为代理顾问的角色提供了新视角，并建议将关注点从仅聚焦于基准建议上转移开。
32559.meta: Programs：CF, LE；JEL：D72, G23, G34, G38, K22

32558.title: Optimal Age-based Policies for Pandemics: An Economic Analysis of Covid-19 and Beyond
32558.zh_title: 大流行病的基于年龄的最优政策：对新冠及其他疫情的的经济分析
32558.authors: Luiz Brotherhood, Philipp Kircher, Cezar Santos, Michèle Tertilt
32558.abstract: This paper investigates the importance of the age composition for pandemic policy design. To do so, it introduces an economic framework with age heterogeneity, individual choice, and incomplete information, emphasizing the value of testing. Calibrating the model to the US Covid-19 pandemic reveals an 80% reduction in death toll due to voluntary actions and the lockdown implemented in the US. The optimal lockdown, however, is more stringent than what was implemented in the US. Moreover, the social planner follows an asymmetric approach by locking down the young relatively more than the old. We underscore the importance of testing, showing its impact on reduced deaths, lower economic costs and laxer lockdown. We use the framework to provide systematic insights into pandemics caused by different viruses (among others the Spanish flu), and underline the influence of economic conditions on optimal policies.
32558.zh_abstract: 本文研究了年龄构成对流行病政策设计的重要性。为此，我们引入了一个包含年龄异质性、个体选择和不完全信息的经济框架，强调了检测的价值。将模型校准至美国新冠疫情，结果显示，由于自愿行动和美国实施的封锁，死亡人数减少了80%。然而，最优封锁比美国实际实施的封锁更为严格。此外，社会规划者采取了一种不对称的方法，对年轻人的封锁相对多于老年人。我们强调了检测的重要性，展示了其对减少死亡、降低经济成本和放宽封锁的影响。我们利用该框架为不同病毒（包括西班牙流感）引起的流行病提供了系统性见解，并强调了经济条件对最优政策的影响。

32557.title: Heterogeneity and Aggregate Fluctuations: Insights from TANK Models
32557.zh_title: 异质性与总体波动：来自TANK模型的洞见
32557.abstract: We analyze the merits and limitations of simple tractable New Keynesian models (RANK and TANK) in accounting for the aggregate predictions of Heterogenous Agent New Keynesian models (HANK). By means of comparison of a number of nested HANK models, we investigate the role played by (i) idiosyncratic income risk, (ii) a binding borrowing constraint, and (iii) a portfolio choice between liquid and illiquid assets. We argue that the effects of household heterogeneity can be largely understood looking at the differential behavior of two types of households: hand-to-mouth and unconstrained. We find that a suitably specified and calibrated TANK model (which abstracts from idiosyncratic income risk) can capture reasonably well the aggregate implications of household heterogeneity and the main channels through which it operates. That ability increases in the presence of a policy rule that emphasizes inflation stability. In the limiting case of a strict inflation targeting policy, heterogeneity becomes irrelevant for the determination of aggregate output.
32557.zh_abstract: 我们分析了简单易处理的新凯恩斯模型（RANK和TANK）在解释异质性代理人新凯恩斯模型（HANK）的总体预测方面的优点和局限性。通过比较一系列嵌套的HANK模型，我们研究了（i）异质性收入风险、（ii）具有约束力的借贷约束，以及（iii）流动性与非流动性资产之间的投资组合选择所起的作用。我们认为，家庭异质性的影响在很大程度上可以通过观察两类家庭（手到口型家庭和无约束家庭）的差异化行为来理解。我们发现，一个适当设定和校准的TANK模型（它抽象掉了异质性收入风险）能够相当好地捕捉家庭异质性的总体含义及其运作的主要渠道。这种能力在存在强调通胀稳定的政策规则时会增强。在严格通胀目标政策的极限情况下，异质性对于总体产出的决定变得无关紧要。

32599.title: Sovereign Haircuts: 200 Years of Creditor Losses
32599.zh_title: 主权债务减记：200年的债权人损失
32599.authors: Clemens M. Graf von Luckner, Josefin Meyer, Carmen M. Reinhart, Christoph Trebesch
32599.abstract: We study sovereign external debt crises over the past 200 years, with a focus on creditor losses, or “haircuts”. Our sample covers 327 sovereign debt restructurings with external private creditors over 205 default spells since 1815. Creditor losses vary widely (from none to 100%), but the statistical distribution has remained remarkably stable over two centuries, with an average haircut of around 45 percent. The data also reveal that “serial restructurings”, meaning two or more debt exchanges in the same default spell, are on the rise. To account for this trend toward serial renegotiation, we introduce the “Bulow-Rogoff haircut” - a cumulative measure that captures the combined creditor loss across all restructurings during a single debt crisis. Using this measure, we show that longer debt crises deliver larger haircuts and that interim restructurings provide limited debt relief. We further examine past predictors of the size of haircuts and identify “rules of thumb” applicable to future defaults. Poorer countries, first-time debt issuers, and those that borrowed heavily from external creditors all record significantly higher haircuts in case of a default. Geopolitical shocks - such as wars, revolutions, or the break-up of empires – deliver the deepest haircuts. Sovereign debt investment disasters are often linked to (geo-)political disasters.
32599.zh_abstract: 我们研究了过去200年的主权外部债务危机，重点关注债权人损失，即“减记”。我们的样本涵盖了自1815年以来205次违约事件中与外部私人债权人进行的327次主权债务重组。债权人损失差异很大（从0%到100%），但统计分布在过去两个世纪中保持显著稳定，平均减记幅度约为45%。数据还显示，“连续重组”，即在同一次违约事件中进行两次或更多次债务交换，正在增加。为了解释这种连续重新谈判的趋势，我们引入了“Bulow-Rogoff减记”——一个累积指标，用于衡量单次债务危机中所有重组造成的债权人总损失。使用这一指标，我们表明，更长的债务危机会带来更大的减记，而临时重组提供的债务减免有限。我们进一步考察了减记规模的历史预测因素，并确定了适用于未来违约的“经验法则”。较贫穷的国家、首次发行债务的国家以及大量从外部债权人借款的国家，在发生违约时记录的减记幅度显著更高。地缘政治冲击——如战争、革命或帝国解体——带来了最深的减记。主权债务投资灾难通常与（地缘）政治灾难相关。

32598.title: Dynamic Identification in VARs
32598.authors: Paul Beaudry, Fabrice Collard, Patrick Fève, Alain Guay, Franck Portier
32598.abstract: Most macroeconomic models view economic outcomes as being generated by a combination of endogenous and exogenous dynamic forces. In particular, the exogenous forces are generally modelled as a set of independent dynamics processes. In this paper we begin by showing that this dual dynamic structure is sufficient to identify the entire set of structural impulse responses inherent to any such model. No extra restrictions are needed. We then use this result to suggest how it can be used to evaluate common SVAR restrictions (impact restrictions, long run restrictions and proxy-VAR).
32598.zh_abstract: 大多数宏观经济模型将经济结果视为由内生和外生动态力量共同作用产生。特别是，外生力量通常被建模为一组独立的动态过程。在本文中，我们首先证明，这种双重动态结构足以识别任何此类模型所固有的整套结构性脉冲响应。不需要额外的限制。然后，我们利用这一结果，提出如何将其用于评估常见的SVAR限制（冲击限制、长期限制和代理变量VAR）。

32597.title: Diffuse Bunching with Frictions: Theory and Estimation
32597.zh_title: 存在摩擦的扩散性聚集：理论与估计
32597.authors: Santosh Anagol, Allan Davids, Benjamin B. Lockwood, Tarun Ramadorai
32597.abstract: We incorporate a general model of frictions into the bunching-based elasticity estimator. The new estimator replaces bunching-window bounds with a “lumpiness parameter” and uses fewer parameters than the conventional approach while delivering additional economically-interpretable quantities such as the size of frictions and unobserved adjustment costs. The model matches rich observed bunching patterns such as sharp-peaked diffuse bunching around tax kinks and depressed density in notch-adjacent dominated regions. We apply the estimator to canonical settings including the U.S. EITC kink, and to administrative tax data from South Africa, where we uncover novel insights on unobserved VAT compliance costs and kink misperceptions.
32597.zh_abstract: 我们将一个一般的摩擦模型纳入基于聚集的弹性估计量中。新的估计量用一个“聚集参数”取代了聚集窗口边界，使用的参数比传统方法更少，同时提供了额外的具有经济解释意义的量，例如摩擦的大小和未观测到的调整成本。该模型匹配了丰富的观测到的聚集模式，例如税收拐点附近尖锐峰值的扩散性聚集，以及断点附近被主导区域中密度下降的模式。我们将该估计量应用于典型场景，包括美国EITC拐点，以及来自南非的行政税收数据，在那里我们发现了关于未观测到的增值税合规成本和拐点误解的新见解。

32596.title: Exchange Rate Disconnect Revisited
32596.authors: Ryan Chahrour, Vito Cormun, Pierre De Leo, Pablo A. Guerrón-Quintana, Rosen Valchev
32596.abstract: We find that variation in expected U.S. productivity explains over half of U.S. dollar/G7 exchange rate fluctuations. Both correctly-anticipated changes in productivity and expectational noise, which influences the expectation of productivity but not its eventual realization, have large effects. This “noisy news” is primarily related to medium-to-long-run TFP growth, and transmits to the exchange rate by causing significant deviations from uncovered interest parity. Together, these disturbances generate many well-known exchange puzzles, including predictable excess returns, low Backus-Smith correlations, and excess volatility. Our findings suggest these puzzles have a common origin, linked to productivity expectations.
32596.zh_abstract: 我们发现，预期美国生产率的变化解释了美元/七国集团汇率波动的一半以上。正确预期的生产率变化以及影响生产率预期但不影响其最终实现的预期噪声，都具有显著影响。这种“噪声新闻”主要与中长期全要素生产率增长相关，并通过导致显著偏离无抛补利率平价来传导至汇率。这些扰动共同产生了许多众所周知的汇率谜题，包括可预测的超额回报、低Backus-Smith相关性以及过度波动。我们的研究结果表明，这些谜题有一个共同的起源，与生产率预期相关。

32595.title: Disaster Management
32595.authors: Agnes Norris Keiller, John Van Reenen
32595.abstract: Climate change is making natural disasters more frequent, yet little is known about the capacity of firms to withstand such disasters and adapt to their increased frequency. We examine this issue using a the latest wave of the World Management Survey (WMS) that includes new questions on firms’ climate change perceptions and adaptation behavior. Combining this with geocoded data on natural disasters and previous WMS waves, we create a panel spanning 8,000 firms across 33 countries and three decades that shows exposure to disasters decreases growth inputs, outputs and firm survival. More importantly, firms with structured management practices are more resilient, suffering much smaller drops in jobs and capital. To understand the mechanisms behind this resilience, we use the new WMS climate questions to show better managed firms have more accurate perceptions of climate-related risks to their businesses. Such firms are also more likely to have implemented measures to adapt to climate change both overall and in response to their perceived climate risk. Other aspects of firm organisation, such as decentralisation, also help protect against disasters, but their adaptation behaviour is not well-targeted. These results show that improving management is one way to help protect economies from climate change shocks.
32595.zh_abstract: 气候变化使自然灾害更加频繁，但关于企业抵御此类灾害并适应其频率增加的能力，我们知之甚少。我们利用最新一轮的世界管理调查（WMS）来研究这个问题，该调查包含了关于企业气候变化认知和适应行为的新问题。结合自然灾害的地理编码数据和之前的WMS轮次，我们构建了一个涵盖33个国家、8000家企业、跨越三十年的面板数据，表明灾害暴露会减少增长投入、产出和企业生存。更重要的是，具有结构化管理实践的企业更具韧性，其就业和资本下降幅度要小得多。为了理解这种韧性背后的机制，我们利用新的WMS气候问题表明，管理更好的企业对其业务面临的气候相关风险有更准确的认知。这些企业也更有可能已经实施了适应气候变化的措施，无论是总体上的还是针对其感知到的气候风险的。企业组织的其他方面，如分权化，也有助于抵御灾害，但其适应行为针对性不强。这些结果表明，改善管理是帮助保护经济体免受气候变化冲击的一种方式。

32594.title: Inflation Targets: Practice Ahead of Theory
32594.zh_title: 通胀目标：实践先于理论
32594.abstract: Inflation targets were introduced well ahead of the development of the theory of inflation targeting. The practice was successful because it comprised a new set of procedures and institutions for setting monetary policy in a transparent and accountable fashion – “constrained discretion”; the later theory was less useful because it purported to be a theory of the determination of the price level. But inflation targeting does not constitute a new theory of the monetary transmission mechanism. The belief that it does led to the replacement of Milton Friedman’s dictum that “inflation is always and everywhere a monetary phenomenon” by the new dictum that “inflation is always and everywhere a transitory phenomenon”. This had unfortunate consequences during the recent inflation. The paper concludes with a discussion of the challenges facing inflation targets in the future.
32594.zh_abstract: 通胀目标的引入远早于通胀目标理论的发展。这一实践之所以成功，是因为它包含了一套以透明和负责任的方式制定货币政策的新程序和制度——“受约束的裁量权”；后来的理论用处较小，因为它声称是价格水平决定的理论。但通胀目标并不构成货币传导机制的新理论。认为它构成新理论的信念，导致米尔顿·弗里德曼的格言“通货膨胀无论何时何地都是一种货币现象”被新的格言“通货膨胀无论何时何地都是一种暂时现象”所取代。这在最近的通货膨胀期间产生了不幸的后果。本文最后讨论了通胀目标在未来面临的挑战。

32593.title: The Price of Housing in the United States, 1890-2006
32593.authors: Ronan C. Lyons, Allison Shertzer, Rowena Gray, David N. Agorastos
32593.abstract: We construct the first consistent market rent and home sales price series for American cities across the 20th century using millions of newspaper real estate listings. Our findings revise several stylized facts about U.S. housing markets. Real market rents did not fall during the 20th century for most cities. Instead, real rental price levels increased by about 20% from 1890 to 2006. There was also greater growth in real housing sales prices from 1965 to 1995 than is commonly understood. Using these series we document several new facts about housing markets. The return to homeownership has varied considerably across cities and over time, but rental returns were historically much more important than capital gains in every city. We discuss the implications of our indices for the business cycle and the consumer price index. Finally, we provide evidence that housing prices increased unevenly across cities over time in response to natural building and regulatory constraints.
32593.zh_abstract: 我们利用数百万条报纸房地产列表，构建了20世纪美国城市首个一致的市场租金和房屋销售价格序列。我们的研究结果修正了关于美国住房市场的几个典型事实。对于大多数城市而言，实际市场租金在20世纪并未下降。相反，从1890年到2006年，实际租金价格水平上涨了约20%。1965年至1995年间，实际住房销售价格的增长也比通常理解的要大。利用这些序列，我们记录了关于住房市场的几个新事实。房屋所有权的回报在不同城市和不同时期差异很大，但在每个城市，历史上租金回报比资本收益重要得多。我们讨论了我们的指数对商业周期和消费者价格指数的影响。最后，我们提供的证据表明，随着时间的推移，由于自然建筑和监管限制，各城市的住房价格以不均衡的方式上涨。

32592.title: Charity: Have the Rates of US Households Contributing Money or Time Declined?
32592.zh_title: 慈善：美国家庭捐款或捐时间的比例下降了吗？
32592.abstract: This paper uses the responses to questions about charitable contributions from the Survey of Consumer Finances (SCF) between 1992 and 2022 to consider the rates of US households contributing money or time to charitable organizations. The fraction donating $\$500$ or more remained relatively constant over this period, with about 47% answering they had donated in both 1991 and 2021. The fraction of households volunteering time declined consistently after 2005 from 34% to 26%. When the samples are restricted to those giving financially or those volunteering, the results confirm the relationship between giving time or money depends on people’s other charitable behaviors.
32592.zh_abstract: 本文利用1992年至2022年间消费者金融调查（SCF）中关于慈善捐赠问题的回答，考察了美国家庭向慈善组织捐款或捐时间的比例。在此期间，捐赠500美元或以上的家庭比例保持相对稳定，约47%的家庭在1991年和2021年都表示曾进行过捐赠。志愿捐时间的家庭比例在2005年后持续下降，从34%降至26%。当样本限制在仅捐款或仅捐时间的家庭时，结果证实，捐时间或捐钱的关系取决于人们其他的慈善行为。

32591.title: Is Software Eating the World?
32591.abstract: When explaining the declining labor income share in advanced economies, the macro literature finds that the elasticity of substitution between capital and labor is greater than one. However, the vast majority of micro-level estimates shows that capital and labor are complements (elasticity less than one). Using firm- and establishment-level data from Korea, we divide capital into equipment and software, as they may interact with labor in different ways. Our estimation shows that equipment and labor are complements (elasticity 0.6), consistent with other micro-level estimates, but software and labor are substitutes (1.6), a novel finding that helps reconcile the macro vs. micro-literature elasticity discord. As the quality of software improves, labor shares fall within firms because of factor substitution and endogenously rising markups. In addition, production reallocates toward firms that use software more intensively, as they become effectively more productive. Because in the data these firms have higher markups and lower labor shares, the reallocation further raises the aggregate markup and reduces the aggregate labor share. The rise of software accounts for two-thirds of the labor share decline in Korea between 1990 and 2018. The factor substitution and the markup channels are equally important. On the other hand, the falling equipment price plays a minor role, because the factor substitution and the markup channels offset each other.
32591.zh_abstract: 在解释发达经济体劳动收入份额下降时，宏观文献发现资本与劳动之间的替代弹性大于1。然而，绝大多数微观层面的估计显示资本与劳动是互补的（弹性小于1）。利用韩国企业和机构层面的数据，我们将资本分为设备资本和软件资本，因为它们可能与劳动以不同方式相互作用。我们的估计显示，设备资本与劳动是互补的（弹性为0.6），与其他微观估计一致，但软件资本与劳动是替代的（弹性为1.6），这一新发现有助于调和宏观与微观文献在弹性上的分歧。随着软件质量的提高，由于要素替代和内生的加成率上升，企业内部的劳动份额下降。此外，生产会重新配置到更密集使用软件的企业，因为这些企业实际上变得更具生产力。由于在数据中这些企业具有更高的加成率和更低的劳动份额，这种重新配置进一步提高了总体加成率并降低了总体劳动份额。软件的兴起解释了韩国1990年至2018年间劳动份额下降的三分之二。要素替代和加成率渠道同等重要。另一方面，设备价格下降的作用较小，因为要素替代和加成率渠道相互抵消。
32591.meta: Programs：EFG；JEL：D22, D24, D33, E22, E25, L11

32590.title: The Power of Inclusive Labor Force Participation for Mitigating Population Aging: Closing Gaps at the Intersection Between Race/Ethnicity and Gender in the United States
32590.zh_title: 包容性劳动力参与对缓解人口老龄化的力量：缩小美国种族/民族与性别交叉领域的差距
32590.authors: René Böheim, Thomas Horvath, Thomas Leoni, Martin Spielauer
32590.abstract: We develop a dynamic microsimulation model to project the labor force and economic dependency ratios in the United States from 2022 to 2060, taking population projections and the large inequalities between population groups of different race/ethnicity and gender into account. We contrast policy scenarios and show the potential impact that closing the gaps in education, health, and participation rates between population subgroups can have on increasing the U.S. labor force. Our baseline projections indicate an increase of the labor force of about 27 million people by 2060, which is mainly caused by population growth. The downstream effects of removing disparities in population health and educational attainment on labor force participation can add about 10% (+2.6 million people) to our baseline projections. The potential effects of closing gaps between genders and between minority groups and the non-Hispanic White population, however, are much larger if we assume the equalization of participation rates for individuals with similar characteristics. Closing gender gaps within ethno-racial groups, for instance, can add 9.9 to 14.3 million people to the labor force. Overall, reducing disparities in labor force participation rates has the potential to more than compensate the effects of demographic aging on the economic dependency ratio.
32590.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个动态微观模拟模型，用于预测2022年至2060年间美国的劳动力与经济抚养比，同时考虑了人口预测以及不同种族/民族和性别群体之间的巨大不平等。我们对比了政策情景，并展示了缩小人口亚群体在教育、健康和参与率方面的差距对增加美国劳动力的潜在影响。我们的基线预测显示，到2060年劳动力将增加约2700万人，这主要是由人口增长驱动的。消除人口健康和教育程度差异对劳动力参与的间接影响，可在基线预测基础上增加约10%（+260万人）。然而，如果我们假设具有相似特征的个体的参与率均等化，那么缩小性别之间以及少数群体与非西班牙裔白人群体之间差距的潜在影响要大得多。例如，缩小种族/民族群体内部的性别差距，可使劳动力增加990万至1430万人。总体而言，缩小劳动力参与率差距的潜力足以抵消人口老龄化对经济抚养比的影响。

32589.title: Emotions and Subjective Crash Beliefs
32589.authors: William N. Goetzmann, Dasol Kim, Robert J. Shiller
32589.abstract: Over the past two decades, respondents to the Shiller Investor Confidence Surveys have assessed the probability of a catastrophic stock market crash to be much higher than the historical frequency of such events. We decompose these crash probabilities into fundamental and subjective components and use a large language model to estimate the emotional content of respondent narratives. The subjective crash component is strongly associated with high negative affect. We use respondent location to test how news of unusual exogenous shocks affects crash belief formation. The results are consistent the risk-as-feelings hypothesis and suggest a path by which emotional response to news about salient events may play a role in the scale and variation in investor beliefs about rare disasters.
32589.zh_abstract: 在过去二十年中，希勒投资者信心调查的受访者对灾难性股市崩盘概率的评估远高于此类事件的历史发生频率。我们将这些崩盘概率分解为基本成分和主观成分，并使用大语言模型来估计受访者叙述中的情感内容。主观崩盘成分与高负面情绪密切相关。我们利用受访者所在地来检验异常外生冲击的消息如何影响崩盘信念的形成。结果与“风险即感觉”假说一致，并表明对显著事件消息的情绪反应可能在投资者关于罕见灾难信念的规模和变化中发挥作用。

32588.title: Paying Your Fair Share: Perceived Fairness and Tax Compliance
32588.zh_title: 支付你应得的份额：感知公平与税收遵从
32588.authors: Brad C. Nathan, Ricardo Perez-Truglia, Alejandro Zentner
32588.abstract: We provide evidence on the role of perceived fairness in tax compliance. Are households more willing to pay taxes when they believe others are contributing their fair share? We investigate this question through a natural field experiment in the context of U.S. property taxes. Using an information-disclosure experiment, we exogenously shifted households’ perceptions of the average tax rate paid by others. We find that higher perceived average tax rates increase perceptions of fairness and reduce the likelihood of filing a tax appeal. We quantify the effect of fairness in monetary terms: for every additional $\$1$ paid by the average household, an individual taxpayer is willing to contribute an additional $\$0.43$. In the field experiment, subjects were informed about the average tax rate but not why it might differ from their own. In a complementary survey, we show that this context matters: when households learn that others pay lower rates due to exemptions, such as for disability or advanced age, they are more willing to tolerate unequal tax rates.
32588.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于感知公平在税收遵从中的作用的证据。当家庭认为其他人正在贡献其应得份额时，他们是否更愿意纳税？我们通过一项在美国房产税背景下进行的自然实地实验来研究这个问题。利用一项信息披露实验，我们外生地改变了家庭对他人支付的平均税率的感知。我们发现，更高的感知平均税率会增加公平感，并降低提出税收申诉的可能性。我们以货币形式量化了公平的影响：对于普通家庭每多支付1美元，单个纳税人愿意额外贡献0.43美元。在实地实验中，受试者被告知平均税率，但未被告知其为何可能与自身税率不同。在一项补充调查中，我们表明这一背景很重要：当家庭了解到他人因残疾或高龄等豁免而支付较低税率时，他们更愿意容忍不平等的税率。
